metadata.description: Phase 2 native-block composition search for full U_target candidates.

candidates.label: N2_exact_hc_to_exact_hc
notes: Built from optimized legacy blocks plus ideal local qubit Hadamard references.
Candidate fidelity is the ideal cqed_sim logical-subspace fidelity of the composed sequence.
